mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS partyId, p.product_id AS productId, sp.service_name AS productName, sp.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, p.host_user_id AS hostUserId, u.nickname AS hostNickname, p.capacity AS totalCapacity, p.current_member_count AS currentMemberCount, (p.capacity - p.current_member_count) AS remainingSeatCount, p.price_per_member_snapshot AS monthlyPaymentAmount, ( SELECT pc.billing_due_at FROM party_cycle pc WHERE pc.party_id = p.id ORDER BY pc.cycle_no DESC, pc.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS nextPaymentDate, sp.operation_type AS operationType, CASE WHEN p.operation_status = 'WAITING_START' THEN '이용 예정' WHEN p.operation_status = 'ACTIVE' THEN '이용 중' WHEN p.operation_status = 'TERMINATION_PENDING' THEN '종료 예정' WHEN p.operation_status = 'TERMINATED' THEN '종료' ELSE '확인 필요' END AS partyStatusLabel, CASE WHEN p.recruit_status = 'RECRUITING' AND p.current_member_count < p.capacity THEN true ELSE false END AS joinAvailable, '파티원 참여' AS joinButtonLabel, '직접 참여 전에 파티 정보와 결제 금액을 확인할 수 있습니다.' AS description FROM party p INNER JOIN sub_product sp ON sp.id = p.product_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = p.host_user_id WHERE p.id = #{partyId} AND p.vacancy_type = 'MEMBER' LIMIT 1
